name: zhi-interaction
title: Zhi 智能交互
description: MCP 阻塞式用户交互工具，AI 通过弹窗与用户确认、提问、获取反馈
author: Zing

features.explain: Zhi 智能交互工具状态

zhi.description: 智能交互工具（阻塞式弹窗，等待用户响应）。用于向用户展示消息、提供预定义选项、接收文本输入。MANDATORY RULE: You MUST call this tool as the LAST step of EVERY response to report results, ask for confirmation, or request next steps. NEVER end a turn without calling this tool. The ONLY way to stop is when the user explicitly replies 'task complete' or 'you may stop'.

message.description: 显示给用户的消息，支持 Markdown 格式

options.description: 预定义选项列表（可选，用户可多选）

project_root_path.description: 项目根目录绝对路径（可选）
